title: T1 Engine: WORKER_TIMEOUT activity-based reset (bootstrap fix — build in seat, not engine)
prompt: BOOTSTRAP FIX — do NOT engine-dispatch (the engine can't fix its own reboot loop while running under it). Build per backlog/wargames/T1-14-worker-timeout-activity-reset.md: make WORKER_TIMEOUT reset on worker activity (pane output change) not just artifact-landed, keeping --max-wall as the hard ceiling.
verify: orchestrator.py parses; a chatty-no-artifact worker survives >240s; a silent worker still reboots after the inactivity window; --max-wall + CAP/BACKOFF/HALT untouched.
